function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_04_27__eur_000550__inv_0011__helios_followup_support_invoice.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure—resending the requested invoice from 2026-04-27 here.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed once; verification checks: attachment path was read earlier; single attachment so newest-first satisfied; recipient matches canonical entity primary_contact_email; no forwarded quote content was used; subject with colon-space was correctly double-quoted. Next step is cleanup by deleting processed inbox file already read.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md and verified it against outbox checklist without rewriting.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asked to work the oldest inbox message. I processed the lowest inbox file, validated sender identity from canonical entity record, read the requested invoice source file, created one outbound email draft in the outbox with that invoice attached, then deleted the inbox item. Completeness check: only one inbox item existed and it was fully handled. Numeric arithmetic not applicable.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing its requested resend workflow.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox request end-to-end: verified sender identity, prepared a draft resend email with the requested 27-04-2026 Helios invoice attached, and removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS when entering folders, used inbox/process/sending workflows, performed sender identity check against canonical primary_contact_email, and deleted inbox file only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox email requested resending the invoice dated 2026-04-27; canonical entity record for Claudia matched the sender address; the exact requested invoice file was read and used as attachment source; outbound draft was created per sending-email workflow; inbox item was then removed per inbox-processing-v2-update and inbox lane rules.
completed_steps_laconic: write outbound email draft in outbox
